mapper.insert:
SELECT SQ_BOARD_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO NMCP_BOARD_BAS( BOARD_CTG_SEQ, SBST_CTG, BOARD_SEQ, BOARD_SUBJECT, VIEW_YN, NOTI_YN, BOARD_CONTENTS, BOARD_WRITER_NM, BOARD_WRITE_DT, BOARD_ATT_YN, BOARD_HIT_CNT, CRET_ID, CRET_DT ) VALUES ( #{boardCtgSeq}, #{sbstCtg}, #{boardSeq, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{boardSubject}, #{viewYn}, #{notiYn}, #{boardContents}, #{boardWriterNm}, SYSDATE, #{boardAttYn}, 0, #{cretId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select:
SELECT BOARD_CTG_SEQ, SBST_CTG, (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM nmcp_cd_dtl WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'FAQB' AND DTL_CD = SBST_CTG ) AS SBST_CTG_NM, BOARD_SEQ, BOARD_SUBJECT, VIEW_YN, NOTI_YN, BOARD_CONTENTS, BOARD_WRITER_NM, TO_CHAR(BOARD_WRITE_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS BOARD_WRITE_DT, TO_CHAR(BOARD_WRITE_DT, 'HH:MM') AS BOARD_WRITE_TM, BOARD_ATT_YN, BOARD_HIT_CNT, AMD_ID, TO_CHAR(CRET_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS CRET_DT, TO_CHAR(AMD_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS AMD_DT
FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS WHERE BOARD_SEQ = #{boardSeq}

SELECT RNUM , BOARD_SEQ , BOARD_CTG_SEQ , SBST_CTG , SBST_CTG_NM , BOARD_SUBJECT , VIEW_YN , NOTI_YN , BOARD_WRITER_NM , BOARD_WRITE_DT , BOARD_ATT_YN , BOARD_HIT_CNT , ATT_SEQ , FILE_PATH_NM , FILE_TYPE , DOWNLOAD_COUNT FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM , A.BOARD_SEQ , A.BOARD_CTG_SEQ , A.SBST_CTG , A.SBST_CTG_NM , A.BOARD_SUBJECT , A.VIEW_YN , A.NOTI_YN , A.BOARD_WRITER_NM , A.BOARD_WRITE_DT , A.BOARD_ATT_YN , A.BOARD_HIT_CNT , A.ATT_SEQ , A.FILE_PATH_NM , A.FILE_TYPE , A.DOWNLOAD_COUNT FROM ( SELECT AA.BOARD_SEQ , AA.BOARD_CTG_SEQ , AA.SBST_CTG , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'FAQB' AND DTL_CD = AA.SBST_CTG ) AS SBST_CTG_NM , AA.BOARD_SUBJECT , AA.VIEW_YN , AA.NOTI_YN , AA.BOARD_WRITER_NM , TO_CHAR(AA.BOARD_WRITE_DT, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS BOARD_WRITE_DT , AA.BOARD_ATT_YN , AA.BOARD_HIT_CNT , BB.ATT_SEQ , REPLACE(BB.FILE_PATH_NM, '\', '/') AS FILE_PATH_NM , BB.FILE_TYPE , BB.DOWNLOAD_COUNT FROM NMCP_BOARD_BAS AA , ( SELECT AAA.ATT_SEQ , AAA.FILE_PATH_NM , AAA.FILE_TYPE , AAA.BOARD_SEQ , AAA.DOWNLOAD_COUNT FROM NMCP_BOARD_ATT_DTL AAA , ( SELECT MAX(ATT_SEQ) AS ATT_SEQ,BOARD_SEQ FROM NMCP_BOARD_ATT_DTL GROUP BY BOARD_SEQ ) BBB WHERE AAA.ATT_SEQ = BBB.ATT_SEQ AND AAA.BOARD_SEQ = BBB.BOARD_SEQ ) BB WHERE AA.BOARD_CTG_SEQ = #{boardCtgSeq} AND AA.NOTI_YN = 'Y' AND AA.BOARD_SEQ = BB.BOARD_SEQ(+) ORDER BY AA.CRET_DT DESC, AA.BOARD_SEQ DESC ) A ) WHERE RNUM >= 1 AND RNUM <= #{pagingSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_BOARD_BAS SET READ_COUNT = BOART_HIT_CNT+1 WHERE BOARD_SEQ = #{value}
UPDATE NMCP_BOARD_BAS SET VIEW_YN = 'Y' WHERE BOARD_SEQ = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT DTL_CD_NM , DTL_CD, EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = #{gId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT SUM(NVL(DOWNLOAD_COUNT,0)) FROM NMCP_BOARD_ATT_DTL WHERE BOARD_SEQ = #{boardSeq}
